drivers.name: Realtek RTL8821CE Wi-Fi Driver
drivers.description: Official driver for Realtek RTL8821CE 802.11ac PCIe wireless network adapter. Common in HP, Lenovo, and ASUS laptops.

linux.debian: sudo add-apt-repository ppa:kelebek333/rtl8821ce && sudo apt update && sudo apt install rtl8821ce-dkms
linux.rhel: sudo dnf install kernel-devel kernel-headers gcc make git && git clone https://github.com/tomaspinho/rtl8821ce.git && cd rtl8821ce && sudo ./dkms-install.sh

drivers.name: NVIDIA Proprietary GPU Driver
drivers.description: Official proprietary graphics driver for NVIDIA GeForce, Quadro, and Tesla GPUs. Provides optimal performance for gaming and professional applications.

linux.debian: sudo ubuntu-drivers autoinstall || sudo apt install nvidia-driver-535
linux.rhel: sudo dnf install epel-release && sudo dnf config-manager --add-repo=https://download.nvidia.com/XFree86/Linux-x86_64 && sudo dnf install nvidia-driver

macos.brew: echo 'NVIDIA drivers not supported on modern macOS (Metal API only)'

drivers.name: USBPcap - USB Packet Capture Driver
drivers.description: USBPcap is a USB packet capture driver for Windows, commonly used with Wireshark for USB traffic analysis and debugging.

linux.debian: sudo apt install wireshark usbmon && sudo modprobe usbmon
linux.rhel: sudo dnf install wireshark && sudo modprobe usbmon
linux.arch: sudo pacman -S wireshark-qt && sudo modprobe usbmon
